item.title:
AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 7min "He's only got two lengths to find on Zavateri!"
@HawkWing2002 is hoping Alparslan is
Franmberry: Fran Berry @Franmberry · 17min When there’s no Dundalk on Friday.. No se pudo reproducir el contenido multimedia. Recarg
item.description: Fran Berry @Franmberry · 17min When there’s no Dundalk on Friday.. No se pudo reproducir el contenido multimedia. Recargar 1 9 210

item.title: arcorbett: Racing TV reposteó Andy Corbett @arcorbett · 22h https:// givewheel.com/fundraising/12 323/marathon-month-challenge/ …
item.description:
Racing TV reposteó Andy Corbett @arcorbett · 22h https:// givewheel.com/fundraising/12 323/marathon-month-challenge/ …
Running the equivalent miles to the date of the month upto and including the @londonmarathon on the 26th April. Raising money for @ijf_official and Calvert Devon. 351 miles in total. Likes and Retweets very much appreciated. massive thank @Sean_Houlihan1 1 5 2 5 mil
